results.title: Testament to ‘China Opportunity 2.0’ appeal
results.description: In an era marked by rapid global economic shifts and rising uncertainties, the concept of “China Opportunity 2.0” has emerged as a symbol of new possibilities for international trade and innovation. While some China doomsters have expressed “anxiety” over China’s advances in technology and industrial innovation, even promoting the narrative of a so-called “China Shock 2.0” that groundlessly frames China’s development as a “threat” to the global economy, the reality is that “China Opportunity 2.0”, as Chinese Premier Li Qiang said last week, represents comprehensive innovation-driven empowerment and high-return investment prospects. Speaking at the 17th Annual Meeting of the New [...] The post Testament to ‘China Opportunity 2.0’ appeal appeared first on MACAU DAILY TIMES 澳門每日時報 .
